title: Bike Sharing — Hierarchy & flow
description: The hierarchy and flow family: a treemap from our data, a sunburst from a native tree, a Sankey of ridership, and a force-directed network.

blocks.title: Ridership by season → month (derived from the data)
A native hierarchy (Flare class tree)
blocks.description: Same renderer, fed a nested JSON tree instead of tabular data — showing the treemap/sunburst family works from either source.

blocks.title: A real co-occurrence network (Les Misérables)
blocks.description: A force-directed graph over a genuine 77-node / 254-edge network — nodes sized by degree, edges by co-appearance count.
